info.title: FineVoice API
info.description: This is the documentation for the FineVoice API. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact support@finevoice.ai.

post.description: Convert text into natural-sounding speech using a selected AI voice model.

200.description: Task accepted. Returns a taskId for async polling or the result URL directly.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.

422.description: Validation error — check request body fields.

post.description: Transform the voice in an audio file to a different AI voice while preserving the original content.

200.description: Task accepted. Returns a taskId for async polling or the result URL directly.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.

422.description: Validation error — check request body fields.

post.description: Transcribe speech from an audio or video URL into text, with optional speaker diarization and word-level timestamps.

200.description: Task accepted. Returns a taskId for async polling or the result URL directly.

422.description: Validation error — check request body fields.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific voice model by its name.

parameters.name: desigUuid
parameters.description: Optional design UUID to retrieve a specific voice design version.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated, filterable list of available AI voice models.

parameters.name: categroy
parameters.description: Category filter. `all` returns every voice, `my_voices` returns custom models, `favorite` returns favorited voices.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Language filter using locale codes such as `en-US`, `zh-CN`, `ja-JP`.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Search keyword to filter voice names.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.

get.description: Poll the status and result of an asynchronous audio processing task.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: The task identifier returned by a previous API call.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.

post.description: Generate a royalty-free music track from a text prompt, with control over style, duration, and model version.

post.description: Generate a full music track with vocals and/or instrumentation from lyrics, style description, and reference tracks.

post.description: Reduce background noise and enhance speech quality. Supports WAV/MP3/FLAC/AAC/OGG/OPUS/M4A/WEBM. Returns enhanced audio file.

post.description: Separate two speakers from a mixed audio file using the MossFormer2_SS_16K model. Use `speaker_index` (0 or 1) to select which speaker to return.

post.description: Detect and trim silence segments exceeding a threshold duration while preserving boundary silence to avoid abrupt cuts.

post.description: Detect filler words (um, uh, er, hmm) in audio. Default mode uses a lightweight audio classifier (language-agnostic). Whisper mode uses ASR for precise word-level timestamps.

422.description: Validation error — check request body fields.

post.description: Detect and remove filler words from audio. Default mode uses an audio classifier; Whisper mode uses ASR to precisely locate and cut filler words.

422.description: Validation error — check request body fields.

post.description: Detect and remove stuttering segments from audio using Whisper ASR. Returns processed audio file.

422.description: Validation error — check request body fields.

post.description: Normalize audio loudness using peak, RMS, or combined normalization methods. Returns normalized audio file.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.

422.description: Validation error — check request body fields.

post.description: All-in-one audio processing pipeline. Select steps via boolean flags. Execution order: (1) Speech Enhancement, (2) Remove Mouth Sounds, (3) Remove Long Silences, (4) Super Resolution, (5) Filler Words Removal, (6) Stuttering Removal, (7) Audio Normalization. Returns a download URL.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key.

422.description: Validation error — check request body fields.

AudioTaskResponse.description: Standard response for audio processing tasks.

status.description: HTTP-style status code (200 for success, 202 for in-progress).

url.description: Download URL of the generated audio file (available when completed).

taskId.description: Task identifier for async polling. Use with GET /v1/task/{task_id}.

urls.description: Multiple output URLs (e.g. for separation stems).

status.description: HTTP-style status code (200 for completed, 202 for in-progress).

voice.description: The target voice model name. Retrieve available voices from the List AI Voices API.

text.description: The text content to synthesize. Supports emotion tags such as `[happy]`, `[sad]`, `[breathe]`.

outputFormat.description: The desired output audio format. Supported: `mp3`, `wav`.

useAsync.description: Set to `true` to process asynchronously and receive a `taskId` for polling.

url.description: The source audio or video URL.

title.description: An optional task title for reference.

engine.description: The transcription engine to use. Supported: `whisper`, `funasr`.

word_level_timestamp_alignment.description: Whether to include word-level timestamp alignment.

speaker_diarization.description: Whether to enable speaker diarization (identify multiple speakers).

min_speakers.description: Minimum number of speakers for diarization.

max_speakers.description: Maximum number of speakers for diarization.

script_target.description: The target output script style or format.

SoundEffectGenerationRequest.description: The sound effect generation request payload.

prompt.description: The prompt describing the desired sound effect.
prompt.example: Thunderstorm with heavy rain and distant thunder

negative_prompt.description: The negative prompt describing sounds to avoid.

sourceUrl.description: Source video or image URL for generating contextual sound effects. If provided, `sourceType` is required.

sourceType.description: The source media type. Supported: `image`, `video`. Required when `sourceUrl` is provided.

duration.description: Requested output duration in seconds. Maximum is 30 seconds.

text.example: Welcome to the FineVoice podcast. Today we discuss AI audio...

speakers.description: Voice models used by podcast speakers.

originalText.description: Whether to keep the original text wording.

name.description: The display name of the trained model.

languageCode.description: The language code of the training audio.

audioUrl.description: The remote audio URL used for training.

taskId.description: Task identifier for updating an existing design task.

prompt.description: Voice design prompt describing desired voice characteristics.
prompt.example: A warm, friendly female voice with a slight British accent

previewText.description: Preview text used to audition the designed voice.
previewText.example: Hello, this is a preview of the designed voice.

MusicGenerationByPromptRequest.description: The prompt-based music generation request payload.

prompt.description: The generation prompt describing the desired music.
prompt.example: Upbeat electronic dance music with heavy bass and synth leads

instrumental.description: Whether to generate instrumental-only music (no vocals).

continuation.description: Whether this generation continues a previous clip.

audioId.description: Source audio identifier for continuation or reference.

referVoice.description: Reference vocal track identifier or URL.

referInstrumental.description: Reference instrumental track identifier or URL.

modelVersion.description: Model version. `v3`: optimized for Chinese vocals and traditional styles. `r2`: studio recording quality with highly realistic vocals.

voice.description: The primary target voice model name.

engine.description: Voice conversion engine. `v5`: great for singing (rich vibrato, more noise). `v7`: great for speech (clean, stable).

singers.description: Singer configurations for a multi-singer cover.

auto_f0_adjust.description: Whether to enable automatic F0 adjustment.

MusicCoverSingerRequest.description: A singer configuration for a multi-singer music cover task.

pitch.description: Pitch offset for this singer in semitones.

engine.description: Voice conversion engine. `v5`: great for singing. `v7`: great for speech.

auto_f0_adjust.description: Whether to enable automatic F0 adjustment.

SpeechSuperResolutionRequest.description: The speech super resolution request payload.

RemoveMouthSoundsRequest.description: The remove mouth sounds request payload.

RemoveLongSilencesRequest.description: The remove long silences request payload.

long_silence_ms.description: Silences longer than this value (ms) are trimmed.

keep_silence_ms.description: Silence padding to preserve at boundaries (ms).

FillerWordsRequest.description: The filler words detect/remove request payload.

use_whisper.description: Use Whisper ASR for accurate, language-aware filler word detection.

whisper_model_size.description: Whisper model size: `tiny`, `base`, `small`, or `medium`. Used when `use_whisper` is `true`.

language.description: Language code for Whisper (e.g. `en`, `zh`, `ja`, `fr`). Used when `use_whisper` is `true`.

filler_words_list.description: Comma-separated filler words to detect/remove. Empty = built-in defaults.

whisper_model_size.description: Whisper model size for stutter detection: `tiny`, `base`, `small`, or `medium`.

min_similarity.description: Minimum similarity threshold for stutter detection.

max_gap_ms.description: Maximum gap between stutter repetitions in ms.

method.description: Normalization method: `peak` (prevents clipping), `rms` (uniform volume), or `both` (RMS first, then peak).

PipelineRequest.description: The all-in-one audio processing pipeline request payload.

step_super_resolution.description: Enable Super Resolution step (8 kHz to 48 kHz).

enhancement_use_vad.description: Enable VAD preprocessing for speech enhancement.

long_silence_ms.description: Silences longer than this value (ms) are trimmed.

keep_silence_ms.description: Silence padding to preserve at boundaries (ms).

filler_use_whisper.description: Use Whisper for filler word detection.

filler_language.description: Language code for filler word detection (e.g. `en`, `zh`).

filler_words_list.description: Comma-separated filler words to remove. Empty = built-in defaults.
